definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="Number" id="sumAttackSpeed">sumAttackSpeed</variable><variable type="Number" id="sumMovementSpeed">sumMovementSpeed</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="-7" y="-8"><field name="trigger">player_ticks</field><next><block type="controls_if"><mutation else="1"></mutation><value name="IF0"><block type="entity_haspotioneffect"><field name="potion">CUSTOM:BlizzardEffect</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="entity_add_modifier"><field name="name">blizzard</field><field name="attribute">ATTACK_SPEED</field><field name="operation">ADD_MULTIPLIED_BASE</field><field name="permanent">FALSE</field><value name="value"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.55</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></statement><statement name="ELSE"><block type="entity_remove_modifier"><field name="name">blizzard</field><field name="attribute">ATTACK_SPEED</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></statement><next><block type="variables_set_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="true" has_entity="true"></mutation><field name="VAR">global:witchercraftAttackSpeed</field><value name="VAL"><block type="entity_get_attribute_value"><field name="attribute">ATTACK_SPEED</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
